listitem.para: Model info/config file, if required by the framework.
Model type. Use "auto", "caffe", "tensorflow", "yolo", "darknet", "onnx", "torch", or "tflite". Numeric values 0 to 6 are also accepted.
Loaded net with its' pointer and informations.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This function is used for loading DNN model and used in Scilab for inference system.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Example 2: ONNX MobileNetV2. The model is downloaded from OpenCV Zoo if missing.
Example 3: CLIP zero-shot image classification with precomputed text embeddings.
